ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "employer_type" TEXT /* Type of employer (e.g., Private, Public) */,
  "final_weight" REAL /* Final weight assigned to the respondent's record */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status in the household */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the respondent */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the respondent */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains reported */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses reported */,
  "hr_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income classification (<=50K or >50K) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the respondent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the respondent */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_location" TEXT /* Location where the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_conductor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_income FOREIGN KEY ("income") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educational_levels ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, Masters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the educational degree */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study associated with the educational level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the occupation is primarily found */,
  "average_salary" REAL /* Average salary for the occupation */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Description of the income bracket */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the income bracket */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the income bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken during access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity associated with the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income distribution entry */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income bracket */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group classification */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the occupation */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the respondent */,
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marital status */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for the specified demographics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_marital_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_distribution_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educational_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gain_loss" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital gain/loss entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Amount of capital gains reported */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Amount of capital losses reported */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment */,
  "investment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_gain_loss_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours_worked" (
  "work_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hours_worked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
